eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Yakima, WA; at 6:24 PM on JUN 28, 2026 Effective until 8:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
There is a fast-moving brush fire in the area. Please evacuate the area to allow fire personnel to fight the fire. DO NOT FLY DRONES IN THE AREA. 

from Humman Ln south along Gore rd to Anderson Rd, Across to selah loop rd and back north along Sole Rd
